references.passiveText: People in {location} have been whispering about someone who may not be what they seem.
references.triggerDialogue: You know how tavern talk goes: half truth, half imagination. But {target_npc} mentioned something interesting the other night. Said they saw someone from the settlement meeting with outsiders {location_hint} after dark. Could be nothing. Could be trade, could be trouble. The kind of thing that festers if nobody looks into it.
